q: How much can I really earn?
a: Most partners start with 1–3 deals/month while learning the process. Earnings scale with volume and deal size. Use the calculator on the homepage to model scenarios.
No—there are zero fees to apply and get access to training and materials.
Typical review is 24–48 hours after you submit the application.

q: Do I need experience in finance?
a: No. If you can follow a checklist, communicate clearly, and learn the script, you can start. Training covers the basics.

q: Is this MLM or a pyramid scheme?
a: Partners earn commissions based on funded deals and referrals. Some tiers may include optional team override structures, but compensation is tied to real activity and outcomes—not entry fees.
We provide playbooks for organic outreach, local networking, social DM scripts, and partner link funnels. You bring the hustle; we bring the system.
Short modules on qualifying, application flow, compliance, and follow-up. You’ll also get templates and a deal checklist.

q: How fast do I get paid?
a: Payout timing depends on funding and processing. Many partners receive payouts quickly once deals fund (often same-day/next-day processing depending on the payout method).
Yes. Affiliate and ISO tiers are compatible with part-time schedules. Consistency matters more than hours.

q: What's the difference between affiliate and agent?
a: Affiliates share links and hand off. Agents (ISO) qualify leads, guide applications, and typically earn higher commissions due to deeper involvement.
